case_title: BORTIN, BETTY vs. DEAYLA, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORTIN, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEAYLA, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-30-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-01-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-10-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-30-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-30-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-29-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-29-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING, FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-31-1994 CONTINUED FROM SEP-29-1994 TO OCT-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE Y
SANCTION PAID FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORTIN, BETTY
